prompt_text: Recommended AI tooling tools for AI product teams building and iterating on LLM-powered product features companies
response:
# Recommended AI Tooling for LLM Product Teams

## Core Development & Deployment

### LLM Frameworks & SDKs
- **LangChain** - Chain management, memory, agents (Python/JS)
- **LlamaIndex** - Data indexing and retrieval for RAG
- **OpenAI SDK** - Direct API access, function calling
- **Anthropic SDK** - Claude integration
- **LiteLLM** - Unified LLM provider abstraction layer

### Prompt Management & Versioning
- **Promptly/Prompt.dev** - Version control for prompts
- **Langfuse** - Open-source prompt management
- **Humanloop** - Prompt versioning and A/B testing
- **Braintrust** - Prompt testing and evaluation
- **Modal** - Serverless function deployment

---

## Evaluation & Testing

### Quality Assurance
- **Ragas** - RAG evaluation framework
- **DeepEval** - LLM testing suite
- **Braintrust** - Benchmarking and regression testing
- **Arize Phoenix** - LLM observability and evals
- **Scale Spellman** - Automated evaluation

### User Feedback
- **Replicant** - Evaluation via user comparisons
- **Weights & Biases** - Experiment tracking

---

## Monitoring & Observability

- **Langfuse** - Traces, costs, latency monitoring
- **Arize Phoenix** - LLM-specific observability
- **Datadog** - General infrastructure monitoring
- **Honeycomb** - High-cardinality tracing
- **New Relic** - Application performance monitoring

---

## Vector Databases & Storage

- **Pinecone** - Managed vector DB
- **Weaviate** - Open-source vector DB
- **Qdrant** - Fast vector search
- **Milvus** - Cloud-native vector DB
- **pgvector** (PostgreSQL) - Simple vector extension

---

## Data & Fine-Tuning

- **Hugging Face** - Model hub, training, inference
- **Together AI** - Fine-tuning platform
- **Modal/RunwayML** - Compute infrastructure
- **W&B** - ML experiment tracking
- **Label Studio** - Data labeling for training sets

---

## User-Facing Features

### Chat Interfaces & UI
- **Vercel AI SDK** - React/Next.js integration
- **Chatbase** - White-label chat widgets
- **Poe** - Multi-model chat platform
- **Gradio** - Quick demo UIs

### Knowledge Management
- **Docugami** - Document understanding
- **Document Crunch** - PDF/document processing

---

## Analytics & Usage Insights

- **Mixpanel** - Product analytics
- **Amplitude** - User behavior analytics
- **PostHog** - Open-source analytics
- **Segment** - Customer data platform

---

## Infrastructure & DevOps

- **Replicate** - Model serving/API
- **Hugging Face Inference** - Model hosting
- **Modal** - Serverless GPU compute
- **Banana/Lambda Labs** - GPU infrastructure
- **Docker + Kubernetes** - Containerization

---

## Recommended Stack by Team Size

### **Early Stage (1-5 engineers)**
- OpenAI API + LangChain
- Langfuse (open-source)
- Hugging Face for models
- Vercel AI SDK for frontend

### **Growth Stage (5-15 engineers)**
- LLM framework + Prompt management (Humanloop/Langfuse)
- Vector DB (Pinecone or Weaviate)
- Braintrust/Ragas for evaluation
- Langfuse for monitoring
- W&B for experiments

### **Mature Products**
- Multi-provider abstraction (LiteLLM)
- Enterprise vector DB (Qdrant/Weaviate)
- Comprehensive eval pipeline
- Custom monitoring + Arize Phoenix
- Fine-tuning infrastructure

---

## Quick Selection Matrix

| Need | Top Pick | Alternative |
|------|----------|-------------|
| **Prompt versioning** | Langfuse | Humanloop |
| **RAG evaluation** | Ragas | Braintrust |
